nasb.text: and the face-cloth which had been on His head, not lying with the linen wrappings, but rolled up in a place by itself.

esv.text: and the face cloth, which had been on Jesus’ head, not lying with the linen cloths but folded up in a place by itself.

cnv.text: 也看見耶穌的裹頭巾，沒有和細麻布放在一起，而是捲著放在一邊。

ccb.text: 耶稣的裹头巾则卷着放在另一处，没有和细麻布放在一起。

csbs.text: 也看见原来在耶稣头上的那块头巾，没有与那细麻布条放在一起，被卷了起来，分开放在一边。
